title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pratham Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Pratham Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Pratham Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Pratham Education:
Pratham Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pratham Education!
